name: Tiffany Marlow
description: Tiffany Marlow was the kind of trainer who carried the energy of a spark waiting to hit dry tinder—bright, eager, and always two steps ahead even when she pretended not to be. Her battles weren’t brute force; they were puzzles she unravelled with sharp eyes, quick thinking, and a grin that suggested she already knew how the ending would go. She didn’t posture or flex like some trainers did—her confidence came from experience, instinct, and the silent understanding she shared with Mimikyu. To face her meant stepping into a match that felt lively and unpredictable, yet strangely respectful. She wasn’t there to humiliate—she was there to see what you could do, and whether you could keep up with her rhythm.
creator: BorutaDevil
